languages.text: Древние, давно утратившие функциональность аугменты явно стали объектами поклонения.
Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.
languages.original_text: Древние, давно утратившие функциональность аугменты явно стали объектами поклонения.

traits.locale_text: Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of worship.
Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.
An entire altar decked with candles has been carved into the bark. But at its centre is not the face of a saint or the God-Emperor, but an ancient, meticulously polished bionic arm.
Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of worship.
Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.

languages.text: 祭壇全体がろうそくで飾られ、樹皮に彫り込まれている。しかし、その中央には聖人や神帝の顔ではなく、古くから丁寧に磨かれた義手がある。
languages.original_text: An entire altar decked with candles has been carved into the bark. But at its centre is not the face of a saint or the God-Emperor, but an ancient, meticulously polished bionic arm.

traits.locale_text: 祭壇全体がろうそくで飾られ、樹皮に彫り込まれている。しかし、その中央には聖人や神帝の顔ではなく、古くから丁寧に磨かれた義手がある。

languages.text: 那些早已失效的古老植入物，显然已经成了被崇拜的圣物。
languages.original_text: Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.

traits.locale_text: 那些早已失效的古老植入物，显然已经成了被崇拜的圣物。

languages.text: Çalışmayan eski ogmentasyonların birer tapınma nesnesi hâline geldiği açık.
languages.original_text: Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.

traits.locale_text: Çalışmayan eski ogmentasyonların birer tapınma nesnesi hâline geldiği açık.

languages.text: Ces vieilles augmentations hors d'usage sont manifestement devenues des objets de culte.
languages.original_text: Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.

traits.locale_text: Ces vieilles augmentations hors d'usage sont manifestement devenues des objets de culte.

languages.text: Los aumentos antiguos no funcionales se han convertido en objetos de veneración.
languages.original_text: Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.

traits.locale_text: Los aumentos antiguos no funcionales se han convertido en objetos de veneración.

languages.text: Alte, nicht funktionierende Augmentationen wurden offenbar zu Objekten der Verehrung.
languages.original_text: Ancient non-functional augmentations have clearly become objects of reverence.

traits.locale_text: Alte, nicht funktionierende Augmentationen wurden offenbar zu Objekten der Verehrung.
